full_prompt: Design one of four arms of an electric RC quadrotor design-build-vertical-flight benchmark, sized to carry a 500 g payload through an obstacle course while remaining under the FAA Part 107 sUAS envelope. Per the benchmark RFP: total takeoff mass including payload <= 4.0 kg, battery limited to a single 6S LiPo pack 4000-6000 mAh, hover endurance >= 10 min with payload, payload carry hook mounted at airframe centerline, obstacle course including 1 m x 1 m gates at 2 m altitude. Arm geometry: tubular carbon-fiber (wound CFRP, E = 70 GPa, Poisson 0.30, density 1550 kg/m^3, tensile 900 MPa, compressive 700 MPa), 20 mm OD x 16 mm ID x 250 mm length cantilevered from central hub, with motor mount plate at tip carrying a 320 g BLDC motor spinning a 12-inch (305 mm) propeller at up to 9500 rpm producing up to 12.5 N hover thrust and 20 N peak thrust for evasive maneuvers. Load cases: (LC1) hover: steady 12.5 N upward at motor mount plus motor mass 320 g at 1 g; (LC2) max-thrust evasive: 20 N at motor mount plus 2 g lateral on hub representing aggressive roll; (LC3) propeller unbalance: residual 5% unbalance at 9500 rpm = 158 Hz = 1.0 N radial oscillation at motor mount during full endurance 10 min = 9.5e4 cycles; (LC4) hard landing: 1 m drop onto one arm modeled as 10 g impulse at motor mount; (LC5) storage/transport: clip-on wall load 50 N lateral at tip. Pass/fail: (R1) max ply strain below 0.4% under LC1-LC4, (R2) arm deflection at motor plate under LC2 below 8 mm, (R3) first arm bending mode above 50 Hz to stay below 1P = 158 Hz third harmonic sideband and avoid coupling, (R4) arm mass below 45 g each (4 arms contribute to 4.0 kg budget), (R5) linear buckling eigenvalue under LC4 compression above 3.0. Deliverables: STEP, FEA per case, modal, buckling eigenvalue, and mass table.
short_prompt:
Design one of four arms of an electric RC quadrotor for a design-build-vertical-flight benchmark, carrying a 500 g payload through an obstacle course while staying inside the FAA Part 107 sUAS envelope. Arm material class: filament-wound CFRP tube. No external structural standard is named; design to a 0.4% ply-strain allowable.

Envelope: arm 20 mm OD x 16 mm ID x 250 mm cantilever from the central hub, tip motor mount with a 320 g BLDC motor spinning a 12-inch (305 mm) prop at up to 9500 rpm (12.5 N hover, 20 N peak thrust). Total MTOW 4.0 kg (incl 500 g payload + 6S LiPo), hover endurance >= 10 min.

Load cases.
- LC1 hover: 12.5 N up at the motor mount + 320 g motor mass at 1 g.
- LC2 max-thrust evasive: 20 N at the motor mount + 2 g lateral on the hub.
- LC3 prop unbalance: 5% residual at 9500 rpm = ~1.0 N radial at 158 Hz for 10 min hover (~9.5e4 cycles).
- LC4 hard landing: 1 m drop on one arm, 10 g impulse at the motor mount.
- LC5 transport clip: 50 N lateral at the arm tip.

prompt.title: Design-build-vertical-flight quadrotor arm
prompt.brief: One arm of a 4.0 kg MTOW quad with 320 g motor + 12-inch prop.
